original_snippet_context: Discussion about the gold standard and exchange rates in relation to a potential "Caixa de Conversão."
relevant_quote: Nem sequer.o facto de uma taxa mais alta do que a adoptada para a paridade legal seria cousa nova na nossa própria historia financeira.
justification: This statement suggests a preference for a higher exchange rate, possibly closer to the gold par, which aligns with the orthodox view of maintaining a strong currency.
